topic: Feynman Lectures on Physics Volume I Part IV (Chapters 25-32): Linear Systems, Optics, and Electromagnetic Radiation. Topics: linear systems and superposition review (transfer functions, convolution), Fermat's principle of least time (refraction, mirages), geometrical optics (lenses, mirrors, focal points, aberrations), electromagnetic radiation (Maxwell's equations, dipole radiation, accelerating charges), interference (Young's double slit, thin films, coherence), diffraction (Huygens-Fresnel principle, single slit, gratings, resolution limit), origin of refractive index (Lorentz oscillator model, dispersion), radiation damping and light scattering (Rayleigh scattering, why the sky is blue). Deep research into Feynman's unified wave-optics pedagogy at Caltech 1963.
